name: parcoord-es

en.when_to_use: Use it when a table has many numeric columns and you need to inspect multidimensional correlation, clustering, outliers, and interactive brushing at once (hyperparameter search, multi-metric sensors, multi-attribute product comparison); use a normal chart for one x-y relationship. Hard requirements: link parcoords.css, add class="parcoords" to the container, and provide explicit width/height.
en.why_valuable: Axis scaling, brushing, axis reordering, and density overplotting in parallel coordinates are core multidimensional exploration techniques, and AI is almost certain to introduce bugs when hand-writing linked brushes and axes.

data_in.note: data is an array of row objects, with each object representing one polyline; axes are detected from object keys by default. Numeric keys become brushable coordinate axes, and string keys become category/label dimensions. The container needs class="parcoords", explicit dimensions, and linked parcoords.css.

schema.rows: Array<Record<string, number | string>> -- one sample per row; numeric keys -> brushable coordinate axes, string keys -> category/label dimensions. All rows should have a consistent key set.

spec.note: The container must have class="parcoords" and explicit width/height (its CSS absolutely positions SVG/canvas children and depends on definite container dimensions); default height 400px. vh/percentage height is prohibited.

when_to_use: 一张表很多数值列、要同时看多维相关/聚类/异常并交互刷选(超参搜索、传感器多指标、产品多属性对比)时用它;单一 x-y 关系用普通图。硬要求:需外链 parcoords.css,容器要加 class="parcoords" 且给定显式 width/height。
why_valuable: 平行坐标的轴缩放 + brushing 刷选 + 轴重排 + 密度叠绘是多维数据探索的核心图形,AI 徒手实现 brush 与轴联动几乎必出 bug。

data_in.note: data 是行对象数组,每个对象=一条折线;默认自动从对象键探测各维度轴。数值键成为可刷选的坐标轴,字符串键作类别/标签维度。容器需 class="parcoords" + 显式尺寸,并外链 parcoords.css。

schema.rows: Array<Record<string, number | string>> —— 每行一个样本;数值键→可刷选坐标轴,字符串键→类别/标签维度。所有行应有一致的键集。

spec.note: 容器必须 class="parcoords" + 显式 width/height(其 CSS 把 svg/canvas 子元素绝对定位,依赖容器有确定尺寸);默认 height 400px,禁 vh/百分比高。

example._why: 钉死 rows 是对象数组,数值键=可刷选坐标轴。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;brush 刷选结果若需外传,由消费 AI 接 pc.on('brush'/'brushend') 原生事件并按载体处理。

carriers.widget: supported:把 parcoords.css 显式放进 shadow,容器加 class="parcoords" 与显式尺寸;bind 走 d3 select(node) 已验证支持 shadow 内 DOM 元素,JS 无全局副作用。
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + 外链 CSS,d3 经嵌套 +esm 自解析。

isolation.evidence: 默认导出 ParCoords 工厂(+esm: export{Ln as default})。bind 已验证:ParCoords()(arg) 内部 .selection=b(arg),b 即 d3-selection 的 select(import{select as b}from"/npm/d3-selection@^1.3.0/+esm"),接受 DOM 节点或选择器字符串,无 typeof==="string" 单一分支——故可直传 shadow 内元素。最小渲染链取自 demo/basic.html:ParCoords()(el).data(rows).render().createAxes()(刷选加 .reorderable().brushMode('1D-axes'))。硬依赖 dist/parcoords.css(HTTP 200):其规则把 .parcoords>svg/.parcoords>canvas 绝对定位,故容器须有 class="parcoords" + 显式 width/height。+esm(64735B)grep 无 document.head / document.body / window 副作用——JS 零全局足迹,CSS 由本条目手动注入(head 或 shadow)。d3-brush/drag 监听挂在其创建的 svg 上,非 window。注:内部 d3-selection 固定 v1(用 d3.event/d3.mouse v1 API)。
